name: directory layout: _meta/ folder is skipped by the aggregator (it holds INDEX.md and migration records, not rules)
command: mkdir -p tree/_meta && echo "# Index" > tree/_meta/INDEX.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out.json 2>err.txt && grep -E '"files_processed":0' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
